THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAKUBOWSKI, JOSEPH HERNANDEZ, DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1133 FELL STREET #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,833.24 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,833.24, STAYED UNTIL JAN-28-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS; NO OTHER TENANTS CLAIMING POSSESSION. DEFTS' $625 SEC. DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PLTF. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY & COMPLY WITH STIP, PLTF WILL MOVE TO DISMISS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER CONDITIONS.
